newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9; the ~-12% move appears to be a pullback from the Korea robotics rerating rather than a fundamental change. ROBOTIS continues to invest in humanoid/actuator-Q facilities and still plans AI Sapiens and Dynamixel-Q launches in H2 2026. TTM revenue ~$28M with negative EPS.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: no new commercialization evidence since June 9; the -12% is a rerating pullback, not a thesis change, so do not up-rank on the fall. Actuation purity intact but H2 2026 AI Sapiens/Dynamixel-Q launches still unproven and revenue tiny (~$28M, negative EPS).
verdicts.bull: Cleaner humanoid-actuator pure-play than several US comps; H2 2026 product launches could prove commercialization.
verdicts.neutral: No fresh evidence; high-volatility name still richly valued after Korea robotics rerating.
verdicts.bear: Tiny revenue, negative EPS and unproven humanoid demand; valuation depends on future ramp.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI Sapiens / Dynamixel-Q launch and actuator design wins (H2 2026)
verdicts.primaryRisk: Commercialization slippage at a stretched valuation
